variants._comment: 2.1.1 开始被捏脸蛋 有允许 口上文
2.2.1 开始被捏脸蛋 未允许 好意 口上文
2.2.2 开始被捏脸蛋 未允许 敌意 口上文
2.3.2 睡眠中 被捏脸蛋 口上文
2.3.1 时停中 被捏脸蛋 口上文
2.1.2 指令失败拒绝 被捏脸蛋 有允许 口上文
2.2.3 指令失败拒绝 被捏脸蛋 无允许 善意 口上文
2.2.4 指令失败拒绝 被捏脸蛋 无允许 敌意 口上文
2.1.3 ($self$) 被捏脸蛋 结果正面 有允许 口上文
2.2.5 ($self$) 被捏脸蛋 结果正面 未允许 口上文
2.1.4 ($self$) 被捏脸蛋 结果负面 有允许 口上文
2.2.6 ($self$) 被捏脸蛋 结果负面 未允许 口上文

zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Begin_1: $self$没有躲闪，反而主动把脸颊贴向$target$的手心，像只索求抚摸的小动物。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Begin_2: $self$微微眯起眼睛，任由$target$的手指触碰脸颊，嘴角勾起温暖的弧度。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Begin_3: $self$轻笑了一声，并没有阻止$target$的动作，眼神里满是宠溺。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Begin_4: $self$把手中的东西放下，专心地享受起$target$的触碰。"怎么突然这么黏人？"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Begin_5: $self$侧过脸，方便$target$捏得更顺手一些。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Begin_6: $self$整个人僵在原地，眼睛瞪得大大的，完全没反应过来发生了什么。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Begin_7: $self$张了张嘴似乎想说什么，但最终只是错愕地盯着$target$的手。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Begin_8: $self$身体紧绷，视线游移不定，显得手足无措。"那个……这是在做什么？"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Begin_9: $self$像是被定住了一样，连呼吸都屏住了，只有眼睫毛在微微颤抖。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Begin_10: $self$浑身颤抖着，死死咬住下唇，不敢发出一点声音，眼泪在眼眶里打转。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Begin_11: $self$绝望地闭上眼睛，身体缩成一团，任由$target$摆布。"对不起……只要不打我就好……"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Begin_12: $self$脸色苍白，眼神空洞地看着地面，放弃了所有抵抗。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Begin_13: $self$极力克制着想要呕吐的冲动，指甲深深嵌入了自己的掌心。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Sleep_1: $self$发出一声含糊的梦呓，眉头微皱，翻了个身试图躲避骚扰。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Sleep_2: $self$并没有醒来，只是本能地用手蹭了蹭被捏的地方，继续沉睡。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Sleep_3: $self$呼吸依旧平稳绵长，完全不知道自己的睡颜正在被把玩。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Sleep_4: $self$嘴巴微张，随着脸颊被捏住而发出可爱的呼噜声，毫无防备。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_TimeStop_1: $self$保持着上一秒的动作僵立在原地，被手指按压的肌肤呈现出诡异的静止状态。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_TimeStop_2: $self$毫无知觉地任由脸颊被拉扯变形，松手后皮肤也没有立刻回弹。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_TimeStop_3: $self$像是一尊精美的人偶，对外界的肆意侵犯没有任何生理反馈。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_TimeStop_4: $self$静止的眼球上倒映着$target$肆无忌惮的动作，却无法做出任何眨眼的反应。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Allow_1: $self$笑着拍掉了$target$的手。"别闹啦，痒死了！"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Allow_2: $self$向后仰头避开了$target$的手指，做了个鬼脸。"刚化好的妆，不准碰！"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Allow_3: $self$抓住$target$的手腕轻轻推回去。"现在没空陪你玩这个，乖。"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Allow_4: $self$鼓起脸颊，含糊不清地抗议道："脸都要被你捏大了！"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Like_1: $self$礼貌地向后退了一步，拉开了安全距离。"抱歉，我不习惯这样的接触。"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Like_2: $self$尴尬地笑了笑，轻轻挡开了$target$的手。"我们还没熟到这个地步吧？"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Like_3: $self$有些为难地偏过头。"请自重，$target$先生/小姐。"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Like_4: $self$用开玩笑的口吻化解了尴尬，但身体明显在抗拒。"这是另外的价钱哦，开玩笑的。"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Hate_1: $self$猛地打掉$target$的手，眼神冰冷如刀。"别碰我！真恶心！"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Hate_2: $self$像是被脏东西碰到一样迅速擦拭着脸颊，满脸嫌恶。"你有病吗？滚远点！"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Hate_3: $self$后退的同时摆出了防御姿态，厉声喝道："再动手动脚我就报警了！"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Hate_4: $self$死死盯着$target$，从牙缝里挤出几个字："把你的脏手拿开。"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Success_Allow_1: $self$舒服地闭上了眼睛，整个身体的重心都倚靠在$target$身上。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Success_Allow_2: $self$发出一声满足的叹息，双手覆在$target$的手背上，不想让这种接触停下。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Success_Allow_3: $self$的呼吸变得平稳而放松，脸颊因长时间的抚摸而泛起淡淡的红晕。"手法不错嘛……再捏一会儿？"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Success_Allow_4: $self$像猫一样蹭着$target$的掌心。"嗯……感觉一整天的疲惫都消失了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Success_NoAllow_1: $self$原本紧绷的身体慢慢放松下来，看向$target$的眼神变得复杂。"奇怪……竟然不讨厌……"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Success_NoAllow_2: $self$脸红到了耳根，虽然嘴上没说，但不再躲避$target$的视线。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Success_NoAllow_3: $self$低下头，手指紧张地绞着衣角，却并没有推开$target$。"如果是你的话……稍微一下也可以……"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Success_NoAllow_4: $self$有些别扭地嘟囔着："你是对谁都这么做吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Bad_Allow_1: $self$皱着眉头推开了$target$的手，揉了揉有些发红的脸颊。"好痛……你下手太重了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Bad_Allow_2: $self$眼里的笑意消失了，语气变得有些生硬。"玩够了吗？已经很久了。"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Bad_Allow_3: $self$叹了口气，有些无奈地转过身去。"我的脸不是面团，能不能别一直捏？"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Bad_Allow_4: $self$显得有些不耐烦，频繁地查看时间。"差不多可以了吧？"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Bad_NoAllow_1: $self$忍无可忍地一把推开$target$，呼吸急促。"够了！你到底想羞辱我到什么时候！"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Bad_NoAllow_2: $self$眼里的厌恶已经掩饰不住，冷冷地看着$target$。"摸够了吗？我可以走了吗？"
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Bad_NoAllow_3: $self$不再掩饰自己的反感，直接转身离开，留下一个决绝的背影。
zh-cn.com_touch_cheek_Bad_NoAllow_4: $self$虽然没有反抗，但眼神已经完全死寂，把$target$当成了透明人。

en-us.com_touch_cheek_Begin_1: $self$ doesn't shy away, but instead leans her cheek into $target$'s palm, like a small animal seeking affection.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Begin_2: $self$ squints slightly, letting $target$'s fingers touch her cheek as a warm smile curls her lips.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Begin_3: $self$ chuckles lightly, not stopping $target$'s movements, her eyes filled with doting affection.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Begin_4: $self$ puts down what she was holding and fully focuses on enjoying $target$'s touch. "Why so clingy all of a sudden?"
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Begin_5: $self$ turns her face to the side, making it easier for $target$ to pinch.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Begin_6: $self$ freezes in place, eyes wide open, completely unable to process what is happening.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Begin_7: $self$ opens her mouth as if to speak, but ends up just staring at $target$'s hand in bewilderment.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Begin_8: $self$'s body tenses up, her gaze darting around, looking flustered. "Um... what are you doing?"
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Begin_9: $self$ looks frozen, even holding her breath, with only her eyelashes trembling slightly.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Begin_10: $self$ is trembling all over, biting her lower lip hard, daring not to make a sound as tears well up in her eyes.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Begin_11: $self$ closes her eyes in despair, curling into a ball and letting $target$ do as they please. "I'm sorry... as long as you don't hit me..."
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Begin_12: $self$ turns pale, staring blankly at the ground, having given up all resistance.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Begin_13: $self$ tries hard to suppress the urge to vomit, her fingernails digging deep into her palms.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Sleep_1: $self$ mumbles something incoherent in her sleep, frowning slightly, and rolls over trying to escape the disturbance.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Sleep_2: $self$ doesn't wake up, but instinctively nuzzles her cheek against where she was pinched, continuing to sleep.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Sleep_3: $self$'s breathing remains steady and deep, completely unaware that her sleeping face is being played with.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Sleep_4: $self$'s mouth parts slightly, letting out a cute snoring sound as her cheek is pinched, totally defenseless.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_TimeStop_1: $self$ remains frozen in her previous action, the skin pressed by the fingers showing an eerie stillness.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_TimeStop_2: $self$ unwittingly lets her cheek be pulled and distorted; the skin doesn't immediately bounce back after release.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_TimeStop_3: $self$ is like an exquisite doll, showing no physiological response to the violation from the outside world.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_TimeStop_4: $self$'s motionless eyes reflect $target$'s brazen actions, yet she cannot even blink in reaction.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Allow_1: $self$ laughs and swats $target$'s hand away. "Stop it, that tickles!"
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Allow_2: $self$ tilts her head back to dodge $target$'s fingers, making a funny face. "I just did my makeup, don't touch!"
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Allow_3: $self$ grabs $target$'s wrist and gently pushes it back. "No time to play right now, be good."
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Allow_4: $self$ puffs out her cheeks and protests mumblingly, "You're going to make my face huge!"
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Like_1: $self$ politely takes a step back, creating a safe distance. "Sorry, I'm not used to this kind of contact."
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Like_2: $self$ smiles awkwardly and gently blocks $target$'s hand. "We aren't that close yet, are we?"
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Like_3: $self$ turns her head away, looking troubled. "Please have some respect, Mr./Ms. $target$."
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Like_4: $self$ tries to diffuse the awkwardness with a joke, but her body is clearly resisting. "That'll cost you extra... just kidding."
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Hate_1: $self$ abruptly slaps $target$'s hand away, her eyes cold as ice. "Don't touch me! That's disgusting!"
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Hate_2: $self$ wipes her cheek quickly as if touched by something dirty, looking full of revulsion. "Are you sick? Get away from me!"
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Hate_3: $self$ steps back into a defensive stance, shouting sternly, "Touch me again and I'm calling the police!"
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Fail_Hate_4: $self$ stares daggers at $target$, squeezing out the words through gritted teeth, "Get your dirty hands off me."
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Success_Allow_1: $self$ closes her eyes comfortably, leaning her entire body weight against $target$.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Success_Allow_2: $self$ lets out a satisfied sigh, placing her hands over $target$'s, not wanting the contact to stop.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Success_Allow_3: $self$'s breathing becomes steady and relaxed, a faint blush rising on her cheeks from the prolonged caress. "You're pretty good at this... keep going?"
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Success_Allow_4: $self$ nuzzles against $target$'s palm like a cat. "Mmm... feels like all the day's fatigue is melting away."
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Success_NoAllow_1: $self$'s previously tense body slowly relaxes, her gaze at $target$ becoming complex. "Strange... I don't actually hate this..."
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Success_NoAllow_2: $self$ blushes to her ears, and although she says nothing, she no longer avoids $target$'s gaze.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Success_NoAllow_3: $self$ lowers her head, fingers nervously twisting the hem of her clothes, but doesn't push $target$ away. "If it's you... maybe just a little bit is okay..."
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Success_NoAllow_4: $self$ mumbles somewhat awkwardly, "Do you do this to everyone?"
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Bad_Allow_1: $self$ pushes $target$'s hand away with a frown, rubbing her slightly reddened cheek. "Ouch... you're too rough."
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Bad_Allow_2: $self$'s smile disappears, her tone becoming a bit stiff. "Had enough? It's been a while now."
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Bad_Allow_3: $self$ sighs and turns away helplessly. "My face isn't dough, could you stop pinching it?"
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Bad_Allow_4: $self$ looks impatient, checking the time frequently. "That's about enough, right?"
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Bad_NoAllow_1: $self$ pushes $target$ away, unable to take it anymore, breathing heavily. "Enough! How long do you plan to humiliate me!"
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Bad_NoAllow_2: $self$ can no longer hide the disgust in her eyes, staring coldly at $target$. "Done touching? Can I go now?"
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Bad_NoAllow_3: $self$ stops hiding her aversion and turns to leave, showing a resolute back.
en-us.com_touch_cheek_Bad_NoAllow_4: $self$ doesn't resist, but her eyes have gone completely dead, treating $target$ as if they were transparent.
